channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: 1950s Sweetheart & Polka Dot Tease❤️ Grok Imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: $TSLA🇰🇷 BREAKING : Tesla Korea delivered 11,130 vehicles to customers during the month of March. The...
item.description: $TSLA🇰🇷 BREAKING : Tesla Korea delivered 11,130 vehicles to customers during the month of March. The figure is quite a surprise. Tesla has recorded its highest monthly sales since entering the Korean market in 2017. That's an incredible number, and I can see how much Koreans care about Tesla. Look at the incredible charts!

item.title: @elonmusk: I used to love going to the Westfield mall with my grandchildren. And now, in New York City, the Rit...
item.description: I used to love going to the Westfield mall with my grandchildren. And now, in New York City, the Rite Aid near me used to have a security guard and all shelves locked up. It’s now empty and for rent. So sad 😞

item.title: @elonmusk: They may be onto something with this space based data center thing
item.description: They may be onto something with this space based data center thing

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok & xAI are definitely improving faster than any other AI. Happy 😎
item.description: Grok & xAI are definitely improving faster than any other AI. Happy 😎

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla up 6% YoY, legacy auto down 19%
item.description: Tesla up 6% YoY, legacy auto down 19%

item.title: @elonmusk: You can bring your kids' puzzles to life and expand their imagination with Grok Imagine. The new qua...
item.description: You can bring your kids' puzzles to life and expand their imagination with Grok Imagine. The new quality is awesome.

item.title: @elonmusk: Blue states talk about clean energy, red states build clean energy.
item.description: Blue states talk about clean energy, red states build clean energy.
